Class StatusManager

java.lang.Object
game.StatusManager
public class StatusManager extends Object
Manages the three time-limited status effects: Burn, Freeze, and Wind. Called each frame by Controller.update() and on turn switches.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    BURN_FRAMES_PER_TICK
    Frames between consecutive burn ticks (~1 second at 60 fps).
    static final int
    BURN_TICKS
    Number of burn damage ticks after a Fire hit.
    static final int
    FROZEN_DISPLAY_FRAMES
    Frames the frozen overlay is displayed before the turn is auto-skipped.
    static final int
    WIND_TURNS
    Number of turns the wind oscillation lasts.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    applyFire(int targetNum)
    Applies a burn effect to the given player and starts the fire sound loop.
    void
    applyIce(int targetNum, BasePlayer target)
    Applies a freeze effect: deals 1 HP to the target and starts the ice sound loop.
    void
    applyWind(int targetNum, BasePlayer target)
    Applies a wind effect: deals 1 HP to the target and starts the wind sound loop.
    void
    clearWindEffect(int targetNum)
    Forcefully clears the wind effect on a specific player (used by Cat's AIM ability).

    Decrements the wind turn counter for the player whose turn just ended.

    Advances burn timers and applies 1 HP damage per completed tick.
    boolean

    Counts down the frozen display timer and signals turn-skip when it expires.
    void

    Increments the wind frame counter if a wind effect is active.

  • Field Details

    • BURN_TICKS

      public static final int BURN_TICKS
      Number of burn damage ticks after a Fire hit.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BURN_FRAMES_PER_TICK

      public static final int BURN_FRAMES_PER_TICK
      Frames between consecutive burn ticks (~1 second at 60 fps).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final int FROZEN_DISPLAY_FRAMES
      Frames the frozen overlay is displayed before the turn is auto-skipped.
      See Also:

      public static final int WIND_TURNS
      Number of turns the wind oscillation lasts.

  • Constructor Details

    • StatusManager

      public StatusManager()

  • Method Details

    • updateBurn

      public void updateBurn(BasePlayer p1, BasePlayer p2)
      Advances burn timers and applies 1 HP damage per completed tick. Stops the fire sound when burn expires.
      Parameters:
      p1 - Player 1 reference
      p2 - Player 2 reference

    • updateFreeze

      public boolean updateFreeze(boolean isCurrentPlayerFrozen)
      Counts down the frozen display timer and signals turn-skip when it expires.
      Parameters:
      isCurrentPlayerFrozen - whether the current turn's player is frozen
      Returns:
      true when the freeze timer reaches 0 and the turn must be skipped

    • updateWindFrame

      public void updateWindFrame()
      Increments the wind frame counter if a wind effect is active.

    • applyFire

      public void applyFire(int targetNum)
      Applies a burn effect to the given player and starts the fire sound loop.
      Parameters:
      targetNum - player number to burn (1 or 2)

    • applyIce

      public void applyIce(int targetNum, BasePlayer target)
      Applies a freeze effect: deals 1 HP to the target and starts the ice sound loop.
      Parameters:
      targetNum - player number to freeze (1 or 2)
      target - the BasePlayer instance to apply damage to

    • applyWind

      public void applyWind(int targetNum, BasePlayer target)
      Applies a wind effect: deals 1 HP to the target and starts the wind sound loop.
      Parameters:
      targetNum - player number to oscillate (1 or 2)
      target - the BasePlayer instance to apply damage to

    • onTurnSwitched

      public void onTurnSwitched(int currentPlayerNum)
      Decrements the wind turn counter for the player whose turn just ended. Clears the wind effect and stops the sound when turns run out.
      Parameters:
      currentPlayerNum - the player whose turn is ending (1 or 2)

    • clearWindEffect

      public void clearWindEffect(int targetNum)
      Forcefully clears the wind effect on a specific player (used by Cat's AIM ability).
      Parameters:
      targetNum - player number whose wind effect should be cancelled (1 or 2)

    • getBurnTargetPlayer

      public int getBurnTargetPlayer()
      Returns:
      player number currently burning (0 if none)

    • getBurnTicksLeft

      public int getBurnTicksLeft()
      Returns:
      remaining burn ticks

    • getBurnFrameTimer

      public int getBurnFrameTimer()
      Returns:
      frames elapsed in the current burn tick

    • getFrozenPlayer

      public int getFrozenPlayer()
      Returns:
      player number currently frozen (0 if none)

    • getFrozenDisplayTimer

      public int getFrozenDisplayTimer()
      Returns:
      frames remaining until the frozen turn is skipped

    • getWindTargetPlayer

      public int getWindTargetPlayer()
      Returns:
      player number currently affected by wind (0 if none)

    • getWindTurnsLeft

      public int getWindTurnsLeft()
      Returns:
      remaining wind turns

    • getWindFrameCounter

      public int getWindFrameCounter()
      Returns:
      frames elapsed since wind was applied
